articles.title: Watch: Eggs hurled at TMC MLA Madan Mitra's vehicle amid protest in Kamarhati
articles.summary: Senior TMC MLA Madan Mitra faced protests in Ariadaha, with residents allegedly hurling eggs at his vehicle amid demands for repayment of "cut money." This incident follows a pattern of public anger targeting TMC leaders post-election defeat, fueled by corruption allegations. Similar demonstrations have occurred across the state, reflecting widespread discontent..

articles.summary: The Indian Air Force has announced the selected candidates for Agniveervayu Non-Combatant Intake 02/2026. The merit list, including main and standby candidates, was released on June 6, 2026.

articles.title: UP TGT Answer Key 2026 released at upessc.up.gov.in; here's how to download and raise objections
articles.summary: Uttar Pradesh TGT answer key for 2026 has been released by UPESSC on its official website. Candidates can now check the provisional key to estimate their scores for the June 3-4 exams.

articles.title: Re NEET 2026: NTA denies paper leak rumours, but social media reacts with scepticism
articles.summary: The National Testing Agency (NTA) has refuted social media claims of a NEET (UG) 2026 re-examination paper leak, calling them false and the work of cheating rackets. Despite the NTA's assurances of system security, public reactions express skepticism and frustration over past paper leak controversies and alleged corruption within the examination process..

articles.title: Who is Dhiman Chakma? IAS officer accused of taking bribe, posted in revenue department
articles.summary: Odisha government reinstated 2021-batch IAS officer Dhiman Chakma, who was arrested in June 2025 for allegedly accepting a Rs 10 lakh bribe and possessing Rs 47 lakh in unaccounted cash. Despite an ongoing corruption case, Chakma has been posted as Deputy Secretary in the Revenue and Disaster Management Department, drawing criticism online..
